title: Korak 7

challengeFiles.name: main

tests.text: You should raise a ValueError with the message Duration must be positive when duration is not a positive number.
You should not raise a ValueError when duration is a valid number.

description: Na kraju, kreirajte jednu poslednju if izjavu da proverite da li duration nije veće od 0 i bacite/izbacite ValueError sa porukom Duration must be positive.
